items.definition_en: Pruning shears are scissors designed for cutting plants.
items.example_en: I use pruning shears to trim the rose bushes every spring.

items.definition_en: A compost heap is a pile where garden waste breaks down into soil.
items.example_en: We added the dead leaves to the compost heap in the corner of the garden.

items.definition_en: A watering can is a container used to pour water onto plants.
items.example_en: She filled the watering can and watered the flowers on the patio.

items.definition_en: Mulch is material spread around plants to keep soil moist and reduce weeds.
items.example_en: He puts mulch around his tomatoes to prevent the soil from drying out.

items.definition_en: A wheelbarrow is a small cart with one wheel used to move loads in the garden.
items.example_en: They used a wheelbarrow to carry tools and soil across the yard.

items.definition_en: A rake is a tool with a row of teeth used for gathering leaves or smoothing soil.
items.example_en: I grabbed a rake to clear the fallen leaves from the lawn.

items.definition_en: Fertilizer is a substance added to soil to help plants grow.
items.example_en: We spread fertilizer in the garden to promote healthy growth.

items.definition_en: A trowel is a small hand tool used for digging or planting in the garden.
items.example_en: She used a trowel to plant the new seedlings.

items.definition_en: Weeding is the act of removing unwanted plants from a garden.
items.example_en: Weeding is necessary to keep the flower beds tidy.

items.definition_en: A lawnmower is a machine for cutting grass to an even height.
items.example_en: He pushed the lawnmower across the yard every weekend.

items.definition_en: A hedge trimmer is a tool for cutting and shaping bushes and hedges.
items.example_en: She used the hedge trimmer to keep the shrubs neat and tidy.

items.definition_en: A garden hose is a flexible tube used to water plants and grass.
items.example_en: He unrolled the garden hose to water the vegetable patch.

items.definition_en: A compost bin is a container where organic waste is turned into compost.
items.example_en: They put all kitchen scraps into the compost bin every day.

items.definition_en: Topsoil is the upper layer of soil that is rich in nutrients for plants.
items.example_en: We added new topsoil to the flower beds before planting.

items.definition_en: A shovel is a tool with a broad blade used for digging and moving soil.
items.example_en: He used a shovel to dig holes for the new trees.

items.definition_en: A garden fork is a tool with long prongs for loosening soil or turning compost.
items.example_en: She used the garden fork to break up the hard earth.

items.definition_en: Potting mix is a special soil for growing plants in containers.
items.example_en: He filled the planters with potting mix before adding the flowers.

items.definition_en: Gloves are hand coverings worn to protect your hands while gardening.
items.example_en: She always wears gloves when handling thorny bushes.

items.definition_en: Plant food is a substance that gives plants the nutrients they need.
items.example_en: He adds plant food to the watering can every week.

items.definition_en: A soil conditioner is a product used to improve the structure of garden soil.
items.example_en: They used a soil conditioner to help the new plants grow better.
